summary: The documentation build failed with a SyntaxError while converting the llama.md markdown file to MDX format. The conversion tool encountered invalid syntax in the file that prevented successful documentation generation.
root_cause: SyntaxError in ../transformers/docs/source/en/model_doc/llama.md during MDX format conversion

evidence.quote: SyntaxError: There was an error when converting ../transformers/docs/source/en/model_doc/llama.md to the MDX format.
evidence.reason: This is the explicit error message showing that a SyntaxError occurred during conversion of the llama.md file to MDX format, preventing the doc build from completing.

evidence.quote: raise type(e)(f"There was an error when converting {file} to the MDX format.\n" + e.args[0]) from e
evidence.reason: This shows the conversion tool explicitly caught a SyntaxError when processing the file and re-raised it with context about the MDX conversion failure.

evidence.quote: ::error::Doc build failed because warnings were emitted (fail_on_warning=true).
evidence.reason: This indicates the doc build was aborted due to conversion errors being treated as failures.

suggested_fix: Review the markdown syntax in ../transformers/docs/source/en/model_doc/llama.md for MDX incompatibilities and correct any invalid syntax that prevents conversion to MDX format.
